languages.text: "Будет исполнено, Ваша Светлость! Я передам приказы губернатор-полковнику".
"It will be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will relay the orders to the Colonel-Governor."
languages.original_text: "Будет исполнено, Ваша Светлость! Я передам приказы губернатор-полковнику".

traits.locale_text: "It will be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will relay the orders to the Colonel-Governor."

languages.text: 「お任せいたします、御{mf|殿|殿}様！御城守に伝言いたします」
languages.original_text: "It will be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will relay the orders to the Castellan-Governor."

traits.locale_text: 「お任せいたします、御{mf|殿|殿}様！御城守に伝言いたします」

languages.text: «¡Así se hará, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Transmitiré sus órdenes a{nc| la coronel-gobernadora|l coronel-gobernador}».
languages.original_text: "It will be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will relay the orders to the Colonel-Governor."

traits.locale_text: «¡Así se hará, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Transmitiré sus órdenes a{nc| la coronel-gobernadora|l coronel-gobernador}».

languages.text: “遵命，大人！我即刻向总督上校传达您的命令。”
languages.original_text: "It will be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will relay the orders to the Colonel-Governor."

traits.locale_text: “遵命，大人！我即刻向总督上校传达您的命令。”

languages.text: "Jawohl, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Ich werde Eure Befehle an {nc|die Colonel-Gouverneurin|den Colonel-Gouverneur} übermitteln."
languages.original_text: "It will be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I will relay the orders to the Colonel-Governor."
